# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud compute security.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.1
parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: devenv
    metadata:
      description: Project name used as prefix for resource naming
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure region for all resources
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the VMs
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 20
  adminPublicKey:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SSH public key for Linux VM authentication (password auth is disabled)
  windowsAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for Windows VM (min 12 chars, must meet complexity)
    minLength: 12
  allowedSourceIPCIDR:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >-
        CIDR block of allowed source IPs for RDP/SSH access
        (e.g., your office IP 203.0.113.50/32). Never use 0.0.0.0/0.
  linuxVmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_B2s
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_B1s
      - Standard_B2s
      - Standard_B2ms
      - Standard_D2s_v5
      - Standard_D4s_v5
    metadata:
      description: Size of the Linux VM
  windowsVmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_B2ms
    allowedValues:
      - Standard_B2s
      - Standard_B2ms
      - Standard_D2s_v5
      - Standard_D4s_v5
    metadata:
      description: Size of the Windows VM
  linuxImagePublisher:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Canonical
  linuxImageOffer:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy
  linuxImageSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 22_04-lts-gen2
  windowsImagePublisher:
    type: string
    defaultValue: MicrosoftWindowsServer
  windowsImageOffer:
    type: string
    defaultValue: WindowsServer
  windowsImageSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 2022-datacenter-azure-edition
  enableAutoShutdown:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable auto-shutdown to reduce costs and attack surface
  autoShutdownTime:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "1900"
    metadata:
      description: Auto-shutdown time in 24hr format (HHMM) in UTC
  logAnalyticsWorkspaceSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: PerGB2018
    allowedValues:
      - PerGB2018
      - Free
variables:
  vnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vnet')]"
  vnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/16
  subnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-subnet')]"
  subnetAddressPrefix: 10.0.1.0/24
  linuxNsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-linux-nsg')]"
  windowsNsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-windows-nsg')]"
  linuxVmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-linux-vm')]"
  windowsVmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-win-vm')]"
  linuxNicName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-linux-nic')]"
  windowsNicName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-windows-nic')]"
  linuxPublicIpName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-linux-pip')]"
  windowsPublicIpName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-windows-pip')]"
  logAnalyticsWorkspaceName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-law')]"
  linuxOsDiskName: "[concat(variables('linuxVmName'), '-osdisk')]"
  windowsOsDiskName: "[concat(variables('windowsVmName'), '-osdisk')]"
resources:
  # Log Analytics Workspace for security monitoring and diagnostics
  - type: Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces
    apiVersion: "2022-10-01"
    name: "[variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      sku:
        name: "[parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceSku')]"
      retentionInDays: 30

  # Virtual Network
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetAddressPrefix')]"

  # NSG for Linux VM - SSH only from allowed CIDR, deny all other inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('linuxNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-SSH-From-Trusted
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPCIDR')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            description: Allow SSH only from trusted IP range
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic

  # NSG for Windows VM - RDP only from allowed CIDR, deny all other inbound
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('windowsNsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow-RDP-From-Trusted
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedSourceIPCIDR')]"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            description: Allow RDP only from trusted IP range
        - name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: Inbound
            access: Deny
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            description: Deny all other inbound traffic

  # Public IP for Linux VM - Standard SKU with DDoS protection
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('linuxPublicIpName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4

  # Public IP for Windows VM - Standard SKU with DDoS protection
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('windowsPublicIpName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard
      tier: Regional
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
      publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4

  # NIC for Linux VM - NSG attached at NIC level
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('linuxNicName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('linuxPublicIpName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('linuxNsgName'))]"
    properties:
      networkSecurityGroup:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('linuxNsgName'))]"
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('linuxPublicIpName'))]"

  # NIC for Windows VM - NSG attached at NIC level
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('windowsNicName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('windowsPublicIpName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('windowsNsgName'))]"
    properties:
      networkSecurityGroup:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('windowsNsgName'))]"
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('windowsPublicIpName'))]"

  # Linux VM - SSH key auth only, no password auth, encrypted disks
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[variables('linuxVmName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', variables('linuxNicName'))]"
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('linuxVmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[variables('linuxVmName')]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: true
          ssh:
            publicKeys:
              - path: "[concat('/home/', parameters('adminUsername'), '/.ssh/authorized_keys')]"
                keyData: "[parameters('adminPublicKey')]"
          provisionVMAgent: true
          patchSettings:
            patchMode: AutomaticByPlatform
            automaticByPlatformSettings:
              rebootSetting: IfRequired
            assessmentMode: AutomaticByPlatform
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "[parameters('linuxImagePublisher')]"
          offer: "[parameters('linuxImageOffer')]"
          sku: "[parameters('linuxImageSku')]"
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: "[variables('linuxOsDiskName')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 64
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', variables('linuxNicName'))]"
      securityProfile:
        securityType: TrustedLaunch
        uefiSettings:
          secureBootEnabled: true
          vTpmEnabled: true
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true

  # Windows VM - Encrypted disks, Trusted Launch
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[variables('windowsVmName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', variables('windowsNicName'))]"
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('windowsVmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[take(variables('windowsVmName'), 15)]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('windowsAdminPassword')]"
        windowsConfiguration:
          provisionVMAgent: true
          enableAutomaticUpdates: true
          patchSettings:
            patchMode: AutomaticByPlatform
            automaticByPlatformSettings:
              rebootSetting: IfRequired
            assessmentMode: AutomaticByPlatform
            enableHotpatching: false
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "[parameters('windowsImagePublisher')]"
          offer: "[parameters('windowsImageOffer')]"
          sku: "[parameters('windowsImageSku')]"
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: "[variables('windowsOsDiskName')]"
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
          diskSizeGB: 128
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', variables('windowsNicName'))]"
      securityProfile:
        securityType: TrustedLaunch
        uefiSettings:
          secureBootEnabled: true
          vTpmEnabled: true
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true

  # Guest Attestation Extension for Linux (Trusted Launch verification)
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('linuxVmName'), '/GuestAttestation')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('linuxVmName'))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Security.LinuxAttestation
      type: GuestAttestation
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.0"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      enableAutomaticUpgrade: true
      settings:
        AttestationConfig:
          MaaSettings:
            maaEndpoint: ""
            maaTenantName: GuestAttestation

  # Guest Attestation Extension for Windows (Trusted Launch verification)
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('windowsVmName'), '/GuestAttestation')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('windowsVmName'))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Security.WindowsAttestation
      type: GuestAttestation
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.0"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      enableAutomaticUpgrade: true
      settings:
        AttestationConfig:
          MaaSettings:
            maaEndpoint: ""
            maaTenantName: GuestAttestation

  # Azure Monitor Agent for Linux VM
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('linuxVmName'), '/AzureMonitorLinuxAgent')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('linuxVmName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions', variables('linuxVmName'), 'GuestAttestation')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName'))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Monitor
      type: AzureMonitorLinuxAgent
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.0"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      enableAutomaticUpgrade: true

  # Azure Monitor Agent for Windows VM
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[concat(variables('windowsVmName'), '/AzureMonitorWindowsAgent')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('windowsVmName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions', variables('windowsVmName'), 'GuestAttestation')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName'))]"
    properties:
      publisher: Microsoft.Azure.Monitor
      type: AzureMonitorWindowsAgent
      typeHandlerVersion: "1.0"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      enableAutomaticUpgrade: true

  # Auto-shutdown schedule for Linux VM
  - type: Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules
    apiVersion: "2018-09-15"
    name: "[concat('shutdown-computevm-', variables('linuxVmName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[parameters('enableAutoShutdown')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('linuxVmName'))]"
    properties:
      status: Enabled
      taskType: ComputeVmShutdownTask
      dailyRecurrence:
        time: "[parameters('autoShutdownTime')]"
      timeZoneId: UTC
      targetResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('linuxVmName'))]"
      notificationSettings:
        status: Enabled
        timeInMinutes: 30
        notificationLocale: en

  # Auto-shutdown schedule for Windows VM
  - type: Microsoft.DevTestLab/schedules
    apiVersion: "2018-09-15"
    name: "[concat('shutdown-computevm-', variables('windowsVmName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    condition: "[parameters('enableAutoShutdown')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('windowsVmName'))]"
    properties:
      status: Enabled
      taskType: ComputeVmShutdownTask
      dailyRecurrence:
        time: "[parameters('autoShutdownTime')]"
      timeZoneId: UTC
      targetResourceId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables('windowsVmName'))]"
      notificationSettings:
        status: Enabled
        timeInMinutes: 30
        notificationLocale: en

outputs:
  linuxVmPublicIP:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('linuxPublicIpName'))).ipAddress]"
  windowsVmPublicIP:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('windowsPublicIpName'))).ipAddress]"
  linuxSSHCommand:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('ssh ', parameters('adminUsername'), '@', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('linuxPublicIpName'))).ipAddress)]"
  windowsRDPAddress:
    type: string
    value: "[concat(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('windowsPublicIpName'))).ipAddress, ':3389')]"
  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Access restricted to CIDR: ', parameters('allowedSourceIPCIDR'), '. Linux uses SSH key auth only (password disabled). Trusted Launch with Secure Boot and vTPM enabled. Auto-shutdown: ', if(parameters('enableAutoShutdown'), concat('enabled at ', parameters('autoShutdownTime'), ' UTC'), 'disabled'), '. Azure Monitor Agent installed for security logging.')]"
  logAnalyticsWorkspaceId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsWorkspaceName'))).customerId]"
